title: The Green Sanctuary
lines: The heat was a suffocating shroud, but as you crest the final dune, the air suddenly turns frigid and tastes of damp, iron-rich earth.

Below lies a lush, vibrant basin that shouldn't exist in this wasteland. Tall palms with pulsing, bioluminescent fronds mirror the bruised-purple firmament in a black, glassy pool that looks like a pool of obsidian.
It is a beautiful sanctuary, but the silence here is heavy and expectant. It is the silence of a predator holding its breath.

options.desc: 1. Descend to the water's edge and drink your fill
2. Stay on the ridge and watch for movement below
3. Turn away from the sanctuary and head back to the dunes
